name_en: P Nikin Suede and Calfskin - A classic bestseller returns! A suede and calfskin series! Perfectly replicating top-tier quality! Fully lined in leather, vintage hardware, smooth texture, and looks cooler with a crossbody strap. Simply love it. Size 22x16x12cm, Code 498892
